heading: Membership
label: 30703 Membership
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3070336:506., .July 19, 1954, ch. 536, § 668 Stat. 491
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3070336:506., .July 19, 1954, ch. 536, § 668 Stat. 491

children.heading: .—Eligibility
children.label: a .—Eligibility
children.text: Except as provided in this chapter, eligibility for membership in the corporation and the rights and privileges of members are as provided in constitution and bylaws of the corporation.

children.heading: .—Voting
children.label: b .—Voting
children.text: Each member has one vote in the conduct of official business of the corporation.
